case_title: YOLANDA FOX VS. LUCKY FOOD CENTERS

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, YOLANDA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-28-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUCKY FOOD CENTERS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2009 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: QUEENA HO, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX, YOLANDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUCKY FOOD CENTERS PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY FILED 2 SMALL CLAIMS SUITS IN 2008 (AGAINST SAFEWAY AND ROSS) EACH SEEKING $5000.00 IN DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUCKY FOOD CENTERS
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) IS "DENIED".

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SC-105 REQUEST TO COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF. CASE UNDER SUBMISSION.
